2026-04-08T23:01:49.8791709Z 
2026-04-08T23:01:53.6366061Z The agent output is clean — it simply adds a `needs-triage` label to issue #57956, which is exactly what the Agentic Triage workflow is designed to do. No secrets, no suspicious calls, no code changes, no injected instructions.
